name: Elliptic Curve Point Addition
description: Demonstrates elliptic curve scalar multiplication over a small prime field: computes kG for k = 1..10 on the curve y² ≡ x³ - x + 1 (mod 23), showing each point addition step.
intuition: Adding a point to itself on the curve repeatedly is easy to compute forward but impossible to reverse without knowing k — this 'trapdoor' property is the foundation of elliptic curve cryptography.
